nodes.context: Criminal organization that ran Galveston, Texas, involved in gambling, prostitution, bootlegging, and racketeering.
Controlled the Beach area of Galveston during the 1910s-1920s, under Ollie Quinn and Dutch Voight.
Rival gang controlled by Johnny Jack Nounes and George Musey in Galveston.
Succeeded the Maceo Organization after the brothers' deaths, moved operations to Las Vegas.

edges.context: The Maceo brothers took control of the Beach Gang and transitioned it into their own organization.
The Maceo Organization ran the Downtown Gang away from operating in the city by the 1930s.
After Sam and Rose Maceo's deaths, the Fertitta Group succeeded the Maceo Organization.
